message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. We are discussing the Slice account ending in 1184 with an amount due of 8,400. To proceed, please confirm your full name.
Neha Verma. And like I said, I can’t pay this month—I’m out of work right now.
Identity verified. Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship due to being out of work. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

I’ve already explained the situation—I’m unemployed and I can’t commit to any payment right now.

Based on what you've already shared, a hardship path is noted. For this account, there are no extensions beyond 21 days under current policy, and I do not have a concrete hardship arrangement or payment plan terms available to offer in this chat right now. If your position is that you cannot commit to any payment at this time, I can record that and limit this to review-only unless an approved option becomes available later. Confirm if you want that noted.
Yes, note that. I’m not agreeing to any payment right now.
Noted. I’ve recorded that you are not agreeing to any payment at this time and that you want this treated as review-only unless an approved option becomes available later.
